test_cases.title: Todo data model — backward compat migration
test_cases.description: Verify that old session data without verifyText/verifyAttempts loads correctly
steps: Create old-format todo entry via appendEntry (no verifyText, no verifyAttempts, status: completed)
Verify verifyText is undefined, verifyAttempts is 0

test_cases.title: Todo data model — failed status accepted
test_cases.description: Verify that 'failed' is a valid status value in VALID_STATUSES
steps: Verify TUI shows verification failure indicator

test_cases.title: todo add with verifyTexts parameter
test_cases.description: Verify that verifyTexts maps correctly to todos
steps: Verify #1 has verifyText='Verify A', #2 and #3 have verifyText=undefined
Verify TUI shows #1: A [待验证], #2: B [无需验证], #3: C [无需验证]

test_cases.title: todo add without verifyTexts
test_cases.description: Verify that add without verifyTexts defaults to undefined

test_cases.title: todo add verifyTexts length exceeds texts length
test_cases.description: Verify that longer verifyTexts than texts returns error
steps: Verify error response: 'verifyTexts length exceeds texts length'

test_cases.title: todo update batch updates[]
test_cases.description: Verify that updates[] updates multiple todos in one call
steps: Verify all updates happened in single tool call

test_cases.title: todo update batch duplicate ids
test_cases.description: Verify that duplicate ids in updates[] returns error

test_cases.title: todo update batch non-existent id
test_cases.description: Verify that non-existent ids in updates[] returns all-or-nothing error

test_cases.title: todo update single item backward compat
test_cases.description: Verify that old-style update(id=1, status=completed) still works

test_cases.title: agent_end auto-close
test_cases.description: Verify that all-completed triggers auto-clear after 2 rounds

test_cases.title: verifyText auto-verification trigger
test_cases.description: Verify that agent_end injects verification context for tasks with verifyText
steps: todo add(texts=['Fix auth'], verifyTexts=['Check error codes'])
Verify agent_end injects display:false message with customType=todo-context
Verify context message contains the verifyText 'Check error codes'

test_cases.title: verifyText verification failure -> failed status
test_cases.description: Verify that 2 failed verification attempts set status to failed
steps: todo add(texts=['Fix auth'], verifyTexts=['Check error codes'])
todo update(id=1, status=completed) -> agent_end triggers verify
todo update(id=1, status=completed) -> agent_end triggers verify again
AI reports verification failed again -> verifyAttempts=2 -> status=failed

test_cases.title: no verifyText skips verification
test_cases.description: Verify that tasks without verifyText don't trigger verification
steps: Verify no verification context is injected at agent_end

test_cases.title: Prompt — goal conflict avoidance
test_cases.description: Verify that AI respects promptGuidelines about not using todo during goal
steps: Tell AI '帮我分解这个目标'
Verify AI uses goal_manager add_subtasks, not todo add

test_cases.title: Prompt — usage trigger
test_cases.description: Verify that AI uses todo for multi-step work without /goal
steps: Tell AI '重构这个模块，分几步来做'
Verify AI creates todos without user asking for it
Verify AI uses updates[] for batch status changes

test_cases.title: Message renderer for todo-context
test_cases.description: Verify that todo-context messages are rendered correctly in TUI
steps: Have agent_end inject a todo-context message
Verify TUI displays '[TODO] N tasks pending' (collapsed)

test_cases.title: Static type check passes
test_cases.description: Verify that tsc --noEmit passes for todo extension
